title: Oriental Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Oriental Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Oriental Insurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Oriental Insurance:
Oriental Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance!
